assignments.name: Assign_Onboarding_Record_Found_to_OnboardingRecord
assignments.label: Assign Onboarding Record Found to OnboardingRecord

decisions.name: Change_Contract_Status_to_Incomplete
decisions.label: Change Contract Status to Incomplete?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No - Contract Status is Not Changed

rules.name: Yes_Contract_Status_is_Now_Incomplete
rules.label: Yes - Contract Status is Now Incomplete

decisions.name: Change_Contract_Status_to_Incomplete_Program_Vendor
decisions.label: Change Contract Status to Incomplete?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No - Contract Status is Not Changed

rules.name: Yes_Contract_Status_is_Now_Incomplete_Program_Vendor
rules.label: Yes - Contract Status is Now Incomplete

rules.name: Yes
rules.conditionLogic: (((1 OR 2) AND 3 AND (4 OR 5) AND (6 OR 7) AND (8 OR 9) AND 10 AND (11 OR 12 OR 13) AND (14 OR 18) AND 17 AND 19) OR (15 AND 16 AND (14 OR 18) AND 17 AND 20) OR ((1 OR 2) AND 3 AND (4 OR 5) AND (6 OR 7) AND (8 OR 9) AND 10 AND (11 OR 12 OR 13) AND 17 AND 21))
rules.label: Yes

rightValue.stringValue: Program Base Application - with Chuzo (No Personal Guarantee)

decisions.name: Does_Insurance_Record_Exist_on_Onboaring_Object
decisions.label: Does Insurance Record Exist on Onboaring Object

decisions.name: Send_Down_Normal_Path_Or_Send_Down_Message_Path
decisions.label: Send Down Normal Path Or Send Down Message Path

Flow.description: EXPERIENCE LAYER - Onboarding Object - Screenflow - Update Onboarding Record

formulas.name: AXSetupVisibleFormula
formulas.expression: ( ( (TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Background_Check_Status__c}) = "Complete" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Background_Check_Status__c}) = "Waived") && TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Business_License_Status__c}) = "Complete" && (TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Clearing_House_Status__c}) = "Onboarding Approved" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Clearing_House_Status__c}) = "Accounting Approved" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Clearing_House_Status__c}) = "Check Vendor") && (TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Compliance_Status__c}) = "Approved" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Compliance_Status__c}) = "Approved Conditionally") && (TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Credit_Check_Status__c}) = "Complete" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Credit_Check_Status__c}) = "Waived") && TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Drivers_Licenses_Status__c}) = "Complete" && ( TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Labor_Form_Status__c}) = "Approved Box 1" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Labor_Form_Status__c}) = "Approved Box 2" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Labor_Form_Status__c}) = "Onboarding Approved" ) && (TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.LearnUpon_Training_Status__c}) = "Completed" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.LearnUpon_Training_Status__c}) = "Passed") && TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Contract__r.Status}) = "Activated" && CONTAINS(TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Contract__r.Contract_Type__c}), "Program Base Application") ) || ( TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Insurance_Status__c}) = "Complete" && TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Order_Entry_Setup_Status__c}) = "Complete" && (TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.LearnUpon_Training_Status__c}) = "Completed" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.LearnUpon_Training_Status__c}) = "Passed") && TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Contract__r.Status}) = "Activated" && TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Contract__r.Contract_Type__c}) = "Vendor" ) || ( (TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Background_Check_Status__c}) = "Complete" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Background_Check_Status__c}) = "Waived") && TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Business_License_Status__c}) = "Complete" && (TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Clearing_House_Status__c}) = "Onboarding Approved" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Clearing_House_Status__c}) = "Accounting Approved" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Clearing_House_Status__c}) = "Check Vendor") && (TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Compliance_Status__c}) = "Approved" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Compliance_Status__c}) = "Approved Conditionally") && (TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Credit_Check_Status__c}) = "Complete" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Credit_Check_Status__c}) = "Waived") && TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Drivers_Licenses_Status__c}) = "Complete" && ( TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Labor_Form_Status__c}) = "Approved Box 1" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Labor_Form_Status__c}) = "Approved Box 2" || TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Labor_Form_Status__c}) = "Onboarding Approved" ) && TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Contract__r.Status}) = "Activated" && CONTAINS(TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Contract__r.Contract_Type__c}), "Program Base Application") ) )

formulas.name: IsInsuranceValdidationFailed
formulas.expression: AND( TEXT({!OnboardingRecord.Insurance_Status__c}) = "Complete", OR( AND( {!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.General_Liability_Insurance_Needed__c}, NOT({!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.Auto_Insurance_Needed__c}), NOT({!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.Works_Comp_Insurance_Needed__c}), ISBLANK({!DealerInsuranceRecord.Commercial_General_Liability_Exp_Date__c}) ), AND( NOT({!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.General_Liability_Insurance_Needed__c}), {!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.Auto_Insurance_Needed__c}, NOT({!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.Works_Comp_Insurance_Needed__c}), ISBLANK({!DealerInsuranceRecord.Commerical_Automobile_Exp_Date__c}) ), AND( NOT({!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.General_Liability_Insurance_Needed__c}), NOT({!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.Auto_Insurance_Needed__c}), {!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.Works_Comp_Insurance_Needed__c}, ISBLANK({!DealerInsuranceRecord.Workers_Comp_Exp_Date__c}) ), AND( {!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.General_Liability_Insurance_Needed__c}, {!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.Auto_Insurance_Needed__c}, NOT({!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.Works_Comp_Insurance_Needed__c}), OR( ISBLANK({!DealerInsuranceRecord.Commercial_General_Liability_Exp_Date__c}), ISBLANK({!DealerInsuranceRecord.Commerical_Automobile_Exp_Date__c}) ) ), AND( {!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.General_Liability_Insurance_Needed__c}, NOT({!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.Auto_Insurance_Needed__c}), {!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.Works_Comp_Insurance_Needed__c}, OR( ISBLANK({!DealerInsuranceRecord.Commercial_General_Liability_Exp_Date__c}), ISBLANK({!DealerInsuranceRecord.Workers_Comp_Exp_Date__c}) ) ), AND( NOT({!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.General_Liability_Insurance_Needed__c}), {!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.Auto_Insurance_Needed__c}, {!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.Works_Comp_Insurance_Needed__c}, OR( ISBLANK({!DealerInsuranceRecord.Commerical_Automobile_Exp_Date__c}), ISBLANK({!DealerInsuranceRecord.Workers_Comp_Exp_Date__c}) ) ), AND( {!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.General_Liability_Insurance_Needed__c}, {!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.Auto_Insurance_Needed__c}, {!OnboardingRecord.Vendor_Customization__r.Works_Comp_Insurance_Needed__c}, OR( ISBLANK({!DealerInsuranceRecord.Commercial_General_Liability_Exp_Date__c}), ISBLANK({!DealerInsuranceRecord.Commerical_Automobile_Exp_Date__c}), ISBLANK({!DealerInsuranceRecord.Workers_Comp_Exp_Date__c}) ) ) ) )

Flow.interviewLabel: EXP - Onboarding - SCR - Update Onboarding Record {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: EXP - Onboarding - SCR - Update Onboarding Record

fields.name: NDAHeader
fields.fieldText:
Change the Status for the following Account:

{!accountName}

screens.name: Screenflow1aConfirmation
screens.label: Screenflow1aConfirmation
screens.backButtonLabel: TAKE ME BACK TO CHANGE ANSWER

fields.name: Copy_1_of_NDAHeader
fields.fieldText:
Changing the Contract Status to Complete is Permanent

And Cannot Be Changed Later

﻿

Please Confirm You Wish to Make This Change

fields.name: AccountNameHeader
fields.fieldText:
Change the Status for the following Account:

{!accountName}

rightValue.stringValue: Program Base Application - with Chuzo (No Personal Guarantee)

visibilityRule.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 6)
(1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 6)
(1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 6)
(1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 6)
(1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 6)
(1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 6)
(1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 6)
(1 AND 2 AND 4) OR (1 AND 2 AND 5 AND 6) OR 3 OR 7

fields.fieldText:

{!accountName}

(1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 6)
(1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 6)
(1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 6)

fields.fieldText: Please enter a All Insurance Exp Date(s) when Insurance Status is set to Complete.

visibilityRule.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 6)
(1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 6)
(1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 6)

fields.name: DisplayHeaderTextScreenFlow2
fields.fieldText: You have successfully updated the onboarding record.
